data.title: Southwest Airlines announces 186th quarterly dividend of $0.18 per share for shareholders of record by Sept 3, 2025.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, the Board of Directors of Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.18 per share. This dividend will be paid to shareholders on September 3, 2025, who are on record at the close of business on that day. The dividend will apply to all shares that are currently issued and outstanding.

data.title: Williams report highlights innovation and progress on environmental metrics in Tulsa, Okla., emphasizing improvements in sustainability and operations.
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, Williams has released reports highlighting advancements in environmental metrics. The reports showcase the company's innovation and progress in this area. The data presented outlines significant improvements in key environmental indicators. This demonstrates Williams' commitment to sustainability and responsible practices.

data.title: Ideal Power to discuss Q2 2025 results on Aug 14, 2025, at 10:00 AM EST. Nasdaq: IPWR. B-TRAN® technology.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on July 31, 2025, Ideal Power Inc. (Nasdaq: IPWR) unveiled its B-TRAN® bidirectional semiconductor power switch, known for its high efficiency and patented design. The company, a leader in innovative technology, made this announcement.

IMF: Bitcoin consumes as much electricity as Argentina but isn't counted in GDP because it doesn't create traditional goods or services. The updated System of National Accounts classifies crypto assets as national wealth for better economic measurement.

data.title: Transmit Security warns AI agents are compromising fraud detection systems, causing industry challenges.
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel and Boston, a recent announcement from Transmit Security highlights a concerning issue: AI agents are causing disruptions in fraud detection systems. The warning emphasizes the potential risks associated with these AI agents interfering with the accuracy of fraud detection measures. This revelation serves as a cautionary note for organizations, as they navigate the complexities of cybersecurity. The impact of AI agents on fraud detection systems raises questions about the effectiveness of current security protocols. This warning underscores the need for vigilance and ongoing evaluation of security practices to combat potential threats. Organizations must remain proactive in addressing vulnerabilities in their fraud detection systems, as highlighted by Transmit Security's alert. Stay tuned for further developments on this issue that affects a wide range of industries and organizations globally.

data.title: Study by Steven J. Girdler, MD shows 1,684 cervical artificial discs in 1,043 patients between 2018-2024 were safe and effective.
data.description: Newport Beach, California, July 31, 2025 - In a recent abstract by Steven J. Girdler, MD from DISC Surgery Center, data was presented on the implantation of 1,684 cervical artificial discs in 1,043 patients from 2018 to 2024. This study focused on artificial disc replacement (ADR), a surgical procedure aimed at...

data.title: Clearfield helping Hawaiian Telcom bring fiber to 60% of Hawaii homes, aiming for fully fiber-enabled state by next year.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Clearfield, Inc. (NASDAQ:CLFD), a leading provider of community broadband fiber connectivity, is aiding Hawaiian Telcom in its endeavor to become the first state in the U.S. to be completely fiber-enabled by the end of next year. Through Clearfield's technologies, Hawaiian Telcom has extended fiber connectivity to over 60% of households in Hawaii, covering all main islands and overcoming obstacles presented by the state's diverse terrain. This initiative marks a significant milestone in expanding broadband access across Hawaii.

data.title: TalkingPoints celebrates 10 years, launches solution to combat chronic absenteeism in US schools.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, in San Francisco, a report revealed that chronic absenteeism rates in U.S. schools are at an all-time high. To combat this issue, TalkingPoints, celebrating its 10th anniversary, introduced an innovative Attendance Improvement program. This solution utilizes family engagement to help boost student attendance rates. This initiative comes at a critical time as the education sector grapples with a rising number of students missing school regularly.

data.title: DefectDojo introduces new KEV enrichment feature to simplify EU Cyber Reliance Act compliance.
data.description: DefectDojo, a DevSecOps leader based in Austin, Texas, has unveiled upgraded automated KEV data enrichment functionalities for DefectDojo Pro. This development comes in anticipation of upcoming EU compliance regulations.

data.title: Investors are eyeing $30 billion quantum-ready platforms as 60% of tech professionals lack security, driving concerns.
data.description: Scope Technologies Corp released a news commentary in Vancouver, BC on July 31, 2025. According to a study by Google Cloud, 60% of tech professionals at the director level and above feel they lack sufficient...

data.title: GFT's Wynxx decreases financial institutions' AI and Cloud project launch time by 95% in the US and Canada.
data.description: A global digital transformation firm, GFT, recently shared plans to facilitate cloud and AI digital transformation initiatives for financial institutions in the United States and Canada. Through its latest software development tool, Wynxx, powered by AI, GFT aims to support organizations in upgrading legacy systems, shifting to cloud infrastructure, and implementing new AI solutions. Addressing the need to uphold quality standards while managing expenses during modernization endeavors, Wynxx offers a solution for financial institutions seeking efficient transformations.

data.title: DV expands AI-powered brand suitability measurement to 30 categories on Meta, providing transparency for advertisers.
data.description: In New York, DoubleVerify (NYSE: DV) revealed its enhancement of post-bid brand suitability measurement on Meta’s Facebook and Instagram Feeds and Reels. This expansion covers thirty distinct content-level categories, enabling advertisers to gain more transparency on ad placements. Developed under DV’s client-centric innovation strategy, these categories aim to provide insights into optimizing ad performance. This move signifies DV's commitment to offering detailed media quality verification and campaign outcome proof.

data.title: BlinkOps partners with Microsoft Sentinel for security automation. Integration available in Azure Marketplace, enabling agentic workflows.
data.description: BlinkOps, a leading Agentic Security Automation Platform based in Austin, Texas, has revealed an enhanced partnership with Microsoft. This collaboration includes the integration of BlinkOps with Microsoft Sentinel, accessible on the Microsoft Azure Marketplace. The platform is now offered as an Azure Cloud Service. Users of Microsoft Sentinel can leverage this integration to create and implement automated, agentic workflows driven by BlinkOps. These workflows respond promptly to signals from Microsoft Sentinel, like alerts and incidents.

data.title: Southeast Asia smart electric appliances market to reach $24.36 billion by 2032 with a 13.6% CAGR from 2025-2032. Key players: Samsung, LG, Panasonic.
data.description: A report on the Southeast Asia smart electric appliances market has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, projecting a market size of $24.36 billion by 2032. The market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 13.6% between 2025 and 2032. The report offers insights on product types, protocols, and country-specific forecasts for the region, providing a detailed analysis across major Southeast Asian countries.
PCE just rose for the second month in a row • Headline: 2.6% (vs 2.5%) • Core: 2.8% (vs 2.7%)

data.title: Dia Group reports €38 million net profit, driven by growth in Spain and resilience in Argentina amid economic challenges. New strategic plan emphasizes long-term value.
data.description: In Madrid on July 31, 2025, Dia Group announced a net profit of €38 million for the first half of 2025. This figure illustrates significant growth in Spain and successful operations in Argentina amidst economic challenges. The company's performance aligns with the objectives of their new 2025-29 Strategic Plan, 'Growing every day,' emphasizing the creation of lasting value for stakeholders.
